name: Zenyard
author: Zenyard
description: "AI-powered binary analysis using the Zenyard platform"
longdescription: "Zenyard integrates with Binary Ninja to provide AI-powered analysis of binaries. Functions, globals, and other objects are analyzed by the Zenyard backend, which returns inferred names, comments, and type information directly into your binary."

installinstructions.Darwin: "Install the following pip packages: pydantic>=2.13.0 urllib3>=2.6.3 zstandard>=0.23.0 attrs>=22.2.0 python-dateutil>=2.8.0 pygments>=2.15.0"
